title: cyperus nitens var. patens
intro: Cyperus nitens var. patens, also known as the tall umbrella sedge, is a variety of the Cyperus nitens plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyperus nitens var. patens include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy and other applications.
